# Campus Nexus Copilot Instructions

- Verify the project is built with Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB, Redis, NextAuth, and Socket.IO scaffolding.
- Keep changes tenant-aware and avoid cross-tenant data access.
- Prefer modular, reusable components and server-side helpers.
- Preserve the premium futuristic UI language in all new pages and components.
- Update README and seed data when adding major features.
